## 📊 Interactive Dashboard of Chocolate Sales

This dashboard combines:\
- historical chocolate sales analysis\
- Forecasting

<div style="width:100vw; margin-right: calc(10% - 10vw); margin-left: calc(10% - 10vw)">

<iframe
    title="Chocolate Sales Dashboard"
    width="90%"
    height="800"
    src="https://app.powerbi.com/reportEmbed?reportId=07f0075f-694b-4c68-ae13-6a4aa841430b&autoAuth=true&ctid=47855545-00bb-4800-a65f-e79104ec0fc4"
    frameborder="0"
    allowfullscreen="true"
    style="border:none; border-radius:10px; display:block;">
</iframe>

</div>
